title: Essex Boys: Law of Survival
overview: Essex has been the central hub for many famous criminal activities. For generations Essex Boys have ruled the streets of Essex and East London in their underworld empires.  Many people thought this ended in a Range Rover in 1995.  They were wrong...  Danny - an ex hooligan is driven back into a life of crime after his world is turned upside down on the streets of Essex.
